折角の休日なんだから訓練も休んでダラダラした方がいい――。<br>ってあなたから:
You told me: since it's a rare holiday, I should rest and laze around.
So here we are, sunbathing together...
いくらなんでも、ダラダラしすぎじゃないかしら？<br>あなた……休日はいつもこう:
But don't you think this is way too lazy? Do you always spend your
holidays like this?
べ、別に嫌じゃないわよ……確かに、休むのも修行の内と言うし……<br>こうして、:
I-it's not like I dislike it... After all, they say rest is part of training
too... And just lying here, emptying my mind, isn't so bad.
それに……司令官と２人っきりでいられて、嬉しいし……:
Besides... being able to be alone with the Commander... it makes me
happy...
何でもなーいー。もう二度と言ってあげないんだから。<br>聞き逃しちゃったことを: Nothiiing. I'm never telling you again. Regret missing it... Fufu.
